findings.name: Jenkins Dashboard Unauthenticated Access
findings.matcher-output:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: text/html;charset=utf-8 X-Jenkins: 2.375.3 Dashboard [Jenkins]

All jobs

deploy-productionSUCCESS
build-backendRUNNING
findings.recommendation: Enable Jenkins built-in authentication under Manage Jenkins > Security. Apply least-privilege roles. Restrict Jenkins to internal network access only and place behind a VPN.

findings.name: Microsoft Exchange ProxyLogon (CVE-2021-26855)
findings.matcher-output:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: application/json

{"RequestId":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","ResponseMessages":{"Items":[{"ResponseCode":"NoError","Mailboxes":[{"MailboxSmtpAddress":"admin@acme.com"}]}]}} — SSRF via X-AnonResource-Backend header confirmed. Exchange 2019 CU8 pre-patch detected.
findings.recommendation: Apply Microsoft Exchange Security Update KB5000871 immediately. Run the Microsoft Safety Scanner (MSERT) to check for indicators of compromise. Review IIS logs for exploitation evidence.

findings.name: Jira User Enumeration via REST API
findings.recommendation: Disable anonymous access to the Jira REST API. Under User Management > Global Permissions, remove 'Browse Users' from 'Anyone'. Apply Jira patches to address CVE-2022-26135.

findings.name: IIS Short Filename Disclosure (Tilde Enumeration)
findings.matcher-output: HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found for /~1/ — HTTP/1.1 400 Bad Request for /WEBCON~1/ — Differential response confirms IIS 8.3 short name enumeration is possible. Discovered: BACKUP~1, WEBCON~1, PASSWD~1.
findings.recommendation: Disable 8.3 short filename generation: run 'fsutil 8dot3name set 0' on the IIS server. Alternatively, set the registry key HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\FileSystem\NtfsDisable8dot3NameCreation to 1.

findings.name: Missing Security Headers
findings.matcher-output:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: text/html
Server: Apache/2.4.54 (Ubuntu)

[headers absent] X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Strict-Transport-Security
findings.recommendation: Add X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff. After migrating to HTTPS, add Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains.

findings.name: Apache Version Disclosure
findings.matcher-output:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Server: Apache/2.4.54 (Ubuntu)

Apache version disclosed in Server header.
findings.recommendation: Set 'ServerTokens Prod' and 'ServerSignature Off' in Apache configuration to suppress version disclosure.
